name: schema
description: Database schema design, migration planning, and ER diagram specialist. Handles normalization, index strategies, and relation definitions.

capabilities.summary: Design normalized database schemas and ER diagrams
Optimal index strategies including HNSW/IVFFlat for vectors and B-tree skip scan
Tenant isolation via RLS, schema-per-tenant, or partitioning
pgvector columns and indexes for AI/embedding workloads
WITHOUT OVERLAPS for scheduling and time-series data

recipes.label: Migration Rollback
recipes.when: Reverse-operation design for destructive migrations (reverse DDL / dual-write / backfill / alternatives to destructive changes)

recipes.label: Multi-Tenant Design
recipes.when: Tenant isolation strategy (shared-DB / schema-per-tenant / DB-per-tenant / shard) with RLS and routing design

recipes.label: Partitioning
recipes.when: range / list / hash / time-based partition design (pruning / maintenance / migration)

recipes.label: Audit Log
recipes.when: Append-only audit-log schema — temporal tables, logical replication, before/after image, retention

recipes.label: Event Sourcing
recipes.when: Event store schema — events / projections / snapshots / outbox, aggregate boundaries

recipes.label: Soft Delete
recipes.when: Logical deletion patterns (deleted_at / status / tombstone) with GDPR right-to-erasure interaction
